content_of_post_to_comment: Meaningless judgment doesn’t bother me. If I don’t admire you as a person, if I don’t admire your life, your character, your integrity, or the way you move through the world, then your opinion simply has no weight with me. Not everyone is qualified to evaluate you. And not every voice deserves a seat at your table. Because why would I lose sleep over criticism from someone whose place I wouldn’t trade for my own? The opinions that matter are the ones that come from people whose character I respect. Everything else is just noise.
